title: Cogeto Memory Passport — deletion receipts
description: The user's confirmed deletion receipts, in the exact shape needed to verify them against the instance's hash chain and public key (§B.1). Each receipt stays independently verifiable outside Cogeto.

instance_public_key_pem.description: SPKI PEM of the instance ed25519 public key — verify each receipt's signature against it.

counts_json.description: The signed payload of counts (memory_count, object_keys, requested_by, enumerated_at, …).

prev_hash.description: SHA-256 of the previous confirmed receipt (or the genesis constant for the first).

hash.description: SHA-256 over the canonical receipt payload including prev_hash.

signature.description: base64 ed25519 signature over `hash`, made with the instance private key.
